programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Avianca Airlines 52 sta volando in un cielo sereno quando viene messo nel suo primo circuito di attesa

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una breve tratta si trasforma rapidamente in un incubo per l’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo 243.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Poco dopo il decollo, l’equipaggio del DHL A300 viene catapultato in una lotta per la propria vita.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Minuti dopo il decollo, la coda del gigantesco Boeing 747 si stacca.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un operatore radar militare identifica erroneamente un aereo civile in avvicinamento come un F-14 ostile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: È esplosa una bomba e l’aereo ha subito gravi danni.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante condizioni meteorologiche estreme, un elicottero compie un viaggio di routine.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Boeing 767 si schianta nell’Oceano Atlantico, uccidendo tutte le 217 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno VIA Rail si scontra frontalmente con un enorme treno merci.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno merci che attraversa la periferia deraglia e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Boeing 767 dell’Ethiopian Airlines dirottato rimane senza carburante vicino alle Isole Comore.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air France 358 prende fuoco quando esce di pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il tranquillo volo 009 verso l’Australia, del fumo inizia a riempire la cabina dell'aereo passeggeri.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo problema meccanico si trasforma rapidamente in un’emergenza totale.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I voli United Airlines 585 e US Air 585 si schiantano a pochi anni di distanza l’uno dall’altro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una serie di piccoli errori fa precipitare il volo China Airlines 006 di 30.000 piedi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un 737 militare che trasporta passeggeri di alto rango si schianta a chilometri dalla destinazione prevista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Flash Airlines 604 si schianta nel Mar Rosso pochi minuti dopo il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo gira misteriosamente intorno all’aeroporto di Atene. Qual è l’enigma del volo 522?

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Delta Airlines 191 raggiunge la soglia dell’aeroporto di Dallas Fort Worth.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Rivivi l’incredibile storia di un pilota costretto a far planare in sicurezza un 767 senza motori.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Uno dei disastri più allarmanti nella storia dell’aviazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Per trovare la causa dello schianto del volo South African Airlines 295, dovettero scavare a fondo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo aereo pendolare, il volo Air Midwest 5481, è in un breve tragitto quando si verifica il disastro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Southern Airways 242 entra in una violenta tempesta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air India 182 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi istanti dopo il decollo, i piloti del volo Birgenair 301 vengono bombardati da allarmi confusi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 401 ha tre luci verdi che confermano il carrello bloccato, ma ne funzionano solo due.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un jet privato viene scosso da un violento impatto sopra la foresta amazzonica.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Difetto Fatale” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Chi sta Pilotando l’Aereo?” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo China Airlines 611 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Pan Am 103 esplode improvvisamente nei cieli sopra Lockerbie, in Scozia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Partnair 394 è in crociera a 22.000 piedi quando inizia improvvisamente a precipitare verso il mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una delle collisioni aeree più terrificanti della storia avviene sopra l’India nel 1996.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Adam Air 574 entra in una tempesta e si schianta in mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una rivisitazione di cinque disastri aerei fondamentali e dei cambiamenti che hanno provocato.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Cruel Skies” ripercorre quattro disastri aerei cruciali e mancate tragedie.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti sono diretti a Phoenix, in Arizona, ma prima devono trovare la loro pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: L’aereo si schianta in una foresta e viene avvolto dalle fiamme.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una notte intensa all’aeroporto di Los Angeles, mentre il volo US Air 1493 è in fase di atterraggio.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Airlines 007 vola alto sopra il Mar del Giappone con 269 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un pilota teme che la forte nevicata possa ritardare ulteriormente la partenza.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E07 - Salmon Island
programme.desc: Now that most of the waterfowl have headed further south for migration, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer are putting their efforts into fishing to get the calories they need. They're heading back downriver after packing up camp, zeroing in on an area they think has several moose.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E08 - Log Jammed
programme.desc: While the brothers get closer to a part of the river packed with moose, they face a bunch of problems. They have to find a way around and carry their stuff over a huge pile of logs that could mess up their hunt, possibly pushing them into a part of the river they weren't ready for.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E05 - Operation Wildfire
programme.desc: In this episode on Wardens, we're on the hunt for a troublesome bear that's been rummaging through the neighborhood garbage. Meanwhile, in another area, we're giving citations to a bunch of folks for fishing without a license.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E03 - Engine Trouble
programme.desc: Bad weather in the Aleutians has stranded Charlie Summerville and his construction team at Volcano Bay, while Pat Harvie's old cars are having engine issues.

programme.title: S05:E01 - Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E02 - Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target. Terry and Larry will be testing 5 scenes from the Hard Target films. One of which will make you never look through a peephole again.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E07 - Salmon Island
programme.desc: Now that most of the waterfowl have headed further south for migration, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer are putting their efforts into fishing to get the calories they need. They're heading back downriver after packing up camp, zeroing in on an area they think has several moose.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E08 - Log Jammed
programme.desc: While the brothers get closer to a part of the river packed with moose, they face a bunch of problems. They have to find a way around and carry their stuff over a huge pile of logs that could mess up their hunt, possibly pushing them into a part of the river they weren't ready for.

programme.title: S05:E01 - Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush
programme.desc: After more than three weeks trekking through moose country, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer finally set up camp in a new spot and almost immediately come face-to-face with a massive bull.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E10 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: With the odds piling against them, the 80-mile river adventure is almost over, and brothers Chris and Casey Keefer have one final opportunity to find an Alaskan moose just a few miles from where they'll be picked up at the river junction.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E06 - Operation Trespass
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens are keeping an eye out for people breaking hunting laws, like trespassing, hunting too early, hunting from cars, or taking spike elk.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E03 - S-Smart Terry
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby. Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favourite, Army of Darkness. Terry not only gets to test several scenes, but also gets a sit down with the legendary Bruce Campbell.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E04 - Terry's Brave Heart
programme.desc: Terry gets to annoy Larry with his impersonation of William Wallace from Braveheart. He not only gets to wield Sir William's sword, but also convinces Larry to build him a trebuchet.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E07 - Hawaii Access Shane Dorian
programme.desc: The number of axis deer in Hawaii has exploded, making them a big problem for this stunning Pacific paradise. In this episode, Mario meets up with Shane Dorian, a big wave surfer, as they head out on an expedition.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E08 - Talking Turkey Frank Stallone
programme.desc: Mario teams up with Frank Stalone and heads to Kansas to find Easton turkeys. With Frank's Italian roots, Mario is sure they can create turkey meatballs that taste incredible.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E09 - Backcountry Ice Man Chuck Liddell
programme.desc: Former UFC lightweight champ, Chuck Liddell, and Mario ride horseback in the mountains of Idaho, venturing into bear territory. They're on the hunt for a mysterious protein source.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E10 - 1000 Tuna Quest
programme.desc: Mario heads to the far eastern edge of Canada to visit Prince Edward Island. It's famous for having some of the largest bluefin tuna in the world, with these fish reaching up to 1000 pounds.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E05 - Mountain Mule Deer
programme.desc: Sasquatch, Laramy Miller, hunts the badlands of Montana for mule deer.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E06 - Bear
programme.desc: Laramy is in search of a bear with his Hawken rifle. The bear will be used to provide Laramy with warmth in the cold winters ahead

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E07 - Mountain Lion 1
programme.desc: Laramy Miller rides on horseback with his dogs by his side, hunting the elusive mountain lion in the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E08 - Mountain Lion 2
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller continues his hunt for a mountain lion.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E05 - Masters of Attack
programme.desc: Carnivores can't just pick their meals off trees. To survive, they have to use every trick they've got to catch food that's just as keen on staying alive as they are. If their prey hides, they have to find it. If it runs, they must chase it. They have to track it if it's hard to pin down and beat it if it fights back. The predator might use its strength for the final blow, but the real effort lies in the strategy.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E06 - Devious Defenses
programme.desc: Animals can employ a number of different defenses in order to withstand an attack. Some seek safety in herds, some hide in plain sight, some meet aggression with even stronger aggression, and some build fortresses. Whatever the strategy it is clear that animals will do whatever it takes to survive the wild.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: E’ il giorno della finale a Hell’s Kitchen. I cuochi si svegliano e trovano sul tavolo una sorpresa: ci sono 4 buste per loro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I concorrenti alloggiano nel loft di Hell's Kitchen e hanno una notte intera per studiare il menu che serviranno la sera successiva. Durante la notte i concorrenti vengono svegliati continuamente da una sirena e su un televisore assistono alle lezioni di cucina dello Chef Cracco. Alle 8:00 i concorrenti scendono nelle cucine e Cracco mostra loro come tagliare la carne per fare il filetto alla Rossini.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il servizio non va bene e Cracco è costretto a chiudere anticipatamente prima la cucina blu e poi la cucina rossa. I concorrenti vengono mandati nel loft e hanno 30 minuti di tempo per decidere i loro nominati per l'eliminazione. La squadra rossa nomina Lorena e Amelia, la squadra blu Andrea e Gene.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si affrontano in una sfida diretta sull'assaggio: i due concorrenti, bendati e dotati di cuffie, devono individuare quattro diversi alimenti solo assaggiandoli; vince la squadra che indovina il maggior numero di alimenti. La prova termina in parità, quindi vi è uno spareggio fra i concorrenti più forti delle due squadre (Lorenza e Gianluca) che determina la vittoria dei rossi. Per punizione, la squadra blu deve pulire 90 kg di pesce per il servizio, mentre la squadra rossa si gode alcune ore in un centro benessere.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un concorrente ha la possibilità di presentare un piatto per il calendario di Hell’s Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Tra gli ospiti a cena c’è l'attrice e l'ambasciatore della celebrità di Oxfam, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti concorrenti cucinano versioni gourmet di street food.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La leggenda dei fumetti Stan Lee si siede al tavolo dello chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Termina un servizio a cena impegnativo con solo due chef rimasti a contendersi il premio finale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La gara di cucina raggiunge il suo culmine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay divide gli chef in due squadre di uomini e donne per la loro prima sfida.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un risotto mal riuscito potrebbe segnare la fine per uno sfortunato concorrente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un risotto mal riuscito potrebbe segnare la fine per uno sfortunato concorrente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef realizzano le ricette stampate sul retro delle loro giacche da servire a ospiti VIP.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon sfida il team a fare catering ad una cerimonia di laurea.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre cucinano per la madre di Gordon, Helen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli animi si infiammano quando Gordon rimprovera le squadre di regredire piuttosto che progredire.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa sfida è ispirata all’opera italiana, e le squadre preparano pietanze italiane.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I team preparano una degustazione per una mostra canina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Al servizio serale, i cuochi preparano pietanze per leggende della musica, tra cui Steven Tyler degli Aerosmith.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef in gara sono sfidati a creare piatti ispirati alla cucina indiana.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il servizio serale è tenuto in onore di un gruppo di vigili del fuoco decorati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare i propri stuzzichini da aperitivo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida degli ultimi sei concorrenti è quello di creare un piatto con bistecche Omaha.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti in gara preparano piatti gourmet per amanti del glamping.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quali saranno i due chef in finale?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay sceglie il vincitore della gara di quest'anno.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre affrontano una prova in esterna che ha luogo in una fattoria: i concorrenti devono condurre nelle stalle alcuni animali, ad ognuno dei quali corrisponde un ingrediente; alla fine le due squadre devono preparare un piatto con gli ingredienti conquistati e Cracco determina la squadra vincitrice. I blu propongono dei ravioli di zucca con pancetta, i rossi propongono un filetto di cervo; la squadra rossa vince la sfida e come ricompensa ottiene una serata alla Terrazza Trussardi di Milano in compagnia dello chef Cracco.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre sono protagoniste di un'asta nella quale sono in palio alcuni ingredienti; per aggiudicarsi gli alimenti, ogni team ha a disposizione un budget di 4000 hells, una valuta fittizia con su stampata l'effigie di Cracco. Al termine dell'asta, lo chef Cracco annuncia che con gli ingredienti comprati bisogna preparare tre piatti vegetariani in quarantacinque minuti; per la valutazione, le due squadre nominano un portavoce (Gianluca per i blu e Lorenza per i rossi) che ha il compito di presentare allo chef i tre piatti in ordine crescente dal meno riuscito al più riuscito. La sfida viene vinta dalla squadra rossa, che ottiene come ricompensa una lezione dello chef sulla...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Per la prova in esterna, le squadre vengono condotti in un bosco all'interno del quale sono nascosti alcuni ingredienti. Seguendo due percorsi stabiliti, i concorrenti devono raccogliere tutti gli ingredienti che riescono a trovare e poi utilizzarli per preparare un piatto di carne alla griglia. La squadra vincitrice ha come ricompensa un pomeriggio in un centro benessere e inoltre ha diritto all'ingresso di un nuovo membro: Tommaso per i blu ed Erica per i rossi. La prova viene vinta dai blu e Tommaso entra ufficialmente a far parte di Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco comunica alle squadre che il ristorante aprirà eccezionalmente anche a pranzo e la prova sarà proprio gestire il servizio. I clienti sono un gruppo di bambini e il menu è fatto apposta per loro (pasta al pomodoro, hamburger e patatine fritte, profiteroles) e la squadra vincitrice sarà quella che riuscirà a concludere per prima il servizio. Nonostante un iniziale vantaggio dei blu, la squadra rossa si aggiudica la vittoria e viene ricompensata con un pomeriggio all'interno di un parco acquatico, mentre i perdenti sono costretti a ripulire la sala e le cucine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre ottengono dallo chef Cracco il potere di creare un proprio menu da proporre ai clienti con gli ingredienti presenti in dispensa. Nel frattempo però le squadre si affrontano in esterna: all'interno di un grande ipermercato ogni concorrente deve scegliere casualmente due bandierine che raffigurano gli stemmi delle varie regioni italiane; ad ogni bandierina sono associati degli ingredienti tipici della regione, che devono essere usati per ideare un piatto che racchiuda elementi di entrambe le regioni. Lo chef passa quindi a decidere quali siano le quattro idee migliori e sceglie Sybil e Laura per i rossi e Gene e Matteo per i blu. I quattro cuochi preparano i piatti nelle...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il vincitore della prima sfida andrà a cena con William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Durante il servizio serale, un Gordon infuriato caccia un'intera squadra fuori dalla cucina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef hanno il compito di abbinare le teste di pesce al resto del corpo correttamente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare portate con spaghetti, hamburger, pizza e maccheroni al formaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre devono creare i piatti più deliziosi a base di formaggio al fine di vincere un'avventura in oceano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef creano un servizio speciale a pranzo in onore di due enti di beneficenza gestiti dai vigili del fuoco di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa volta, gli chef devono preparare un pasto greco

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef devono preparare un piatto usando una bevanda alcolica, chesia vino, birra o superalcolici.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef si trovano di fronte a una selezione di alimenti proteici esotici tra cui un alligatore.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida di oggi è preparare una cena di bentornato per il liceo Calabasas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef servono un pasto composto di sei portate per due associazioni di beneficenza.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: È la serata delle bistecche, ma i continui errori di uno chef porteranno alla loro eliminazione?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dopo una cena disastrosa, il suo agnello cotto alla perfezione potrà salvare Josh dal taglio?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef preparano delle portate in piccole porzioni per i partecipanti di una performance sinfonica privata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le emozioni sono alle stelle poiché ogni concorrente in gara fa un turno da capo chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chi sarà presto a capo del proprio ristorante ora che l’annuncio del vincitore di quest’anno si avvicina?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I diciotto chef si dirigono a Las Vegas e cucinano il loro piatto forte prima di essere valutati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Ci sarà il caos quando The Game e il suo entourage si presenteranno a una cena senza preavviso?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono fare una sfida di comunicazione. L'astronauta Buzz Aldrin partecipa alla cena.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quale squadra servirà la cena migliora a base d’anatra a Kris Jenner e Dita Von Teese?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un servizio disastroso porta a un’eliminazione scioccante.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Essendoci una situazione di sbilanciamento numerico degli elementi all'interno delle due squadre, Cracco dà ai rossi il compito di nominare una persona che passerà nei blu. Sybil si propone per lo scambio, per via delle divergenze caratteriali con Carmelo e quindi diviene un elemento della squadra blu. Per la prima sfida, i due team si scontrano in una prova di velocità: un concorrente per ogni squadra si deve lanciare in una vasca piena di ghiaccio e cercare un'etichetta con il nome di un ingrediente; il più veloce si aggiudica l'ingrediente scelto e può imporre allo sfidante sconfitto un ingrediente ostico fra quelli proposti da Cracco. Alla fine i concorrenti devono utilizzare...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si trovano da Peck a Milano: ogni concorrente deve scegliere un sacchetto a sorpresa, contenente un ingrediente molto pregiato; le squadre devono preparare un piatto utilizzando gli ingredienti scelti, ma una volta effettuata la scelta il concorrente può decidere se accettare l'ingrediente oppure pescare da una cassetta un bigliettino con su scritta una tipologia di ingrediente da reperire all'interno del negozio. Per ogni squadra possono cucinare solo due elementi scelti da Cracco: Francesca e Lorenza per i rossi, Gianluca e Carmelo per i blu. La sfida viene vinta dai blu che ottengono come ricompensa un pomeriggio in una pista per go-kart insieme allo chef Cracco. I rossi...

programme.title: Air Bud - Campione a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: La vita di un ragazzino solitario è trasformata quando fa amicizia con un cane “meraviglia” che gli insegna a giocare a basket.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Un'estate per diventare grandi
programme.desc: Dopo essere state trascinate al largo da una forte corrente, tre sorelle si ritrovano naufraghe su un’isola selvaggia popolata da foche e imponenti elefanti marini. Tra pericoli naturali, coraggio e legame familiare, dovranno trovare la forza di sopravvivere e raggiungere un lontano faro.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Dubitando Di Thomas - Bugie E Spie
programme.desc: Thomas è un ragazzo conosciuto per la sua capacità di raccontare sempre frottole. Quando s’imbatte per sbaglio in un piano per rapire la figlia del Presidente, prova ad allertare le autorità.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Una Giornata in Campagna 3 (A Day in the Country 3) | L'Ufficio (The Offcie) | La Spa (The Spa) | Il Parco Divertimenti (The Amusement Park)

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: La Metropolitana (The Underground) | Il Cuoco (The Cook) | Un Cantiere Edile (A Building Site) | Il Tosaerba (The Lawnmower)

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Ginnastica Artistica (Artistic Gymnastics) | Tennis 3 | Basket in Sedia a Rotelle (Wheelchair Basketball) | Judo

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Basket 2 (Basketall 2) | Calcio a 5 (Indoor Football) | Triathlon | Salto in Alto (High Jump)

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Opera | La Cabina Fotografica (The Photobooth) | Lo Zoo (The Zoo) | Incontri Ravvicinati 3 (Close Encounters 3)

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Dressage | Ginnastica Ritmica (Rhythmic Gymnastics) | Maratona 3 (Marathon 3) | Rugby

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Corneil è un fan sfegatato ma segreto di Madame Pavarota, mentre Bernie ha un solo idolo: Vavaroppo, il bomber! Purtroppo per lui, come dog-sitter, dovrà subire lo spettacolo amato da Corneil, armato di radiolina all’orecchio.

programme.title: Boon & Pimento
programme.desc: Pimento sta facendo la doccia, ma all'improvviso l'acqua non scorrere più! Nessun problema, Boon ha un'idea per sistemare tutto in poco tempo... Cosa ordinerà questa volta? Unisciti a loro in questa compilation delle loro folli (dis)avventure per scoprirlo!

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: La Signora Solo prende ad ombrellate Corneil. Stanco dei suoi soprusi, il cucciolo chiede a Bernie di rappresentarlo in corte perché la Signora Solo si scusi con lui. Bernie è bravissimo, ma come al solito, vuole stravincere… perdendo la causa.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Corneil crede che John e Beth vogliano allontanarlo da casa perché aspettano un bambino. In realtà vogliono solo sbarazzarsi di un vecchio carrozzino di famiglia.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Bernie e Corneil passano una settimana in campagna, dai cugini di Bernie. La vita laggiù, per un cane, può essere dura, le regole sono drastiche, ma Corneil sa adattarsi e quando riuscirà a sgominare un coyote, predatore di galline, allora la vita da cane dovrà farla Bernie.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Romeo, rimasto in città e senza amici, prtiti per le vacanze, si serve di Bernie e della sua compagnia, spacciandosi per “vero amico”. Ma Corneil sa perfettamente cos’è la vera amicizia!

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Boy Scout | Il Cagnolino 2 (The Little Dog 2) | La Lampada Magica (The Magic Lamp) | La Torcia Olimpica (The Olympic Torch)

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Boy Scout 2 | L'Antenna TV (The TV Aerial) | Buon Natale (Merry Christmas) | Compleanno (Birthday)

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Corneil vuole dimostrare che il cane è lessere più intelligente, forse, dopo l’uomo. Per questo si presenta a fare un test scientifico, ma dopo aver realizzato che questo potrebbe far scoprire il suo segreto, ci rinuncia. Ma non Bernie…

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: Bogus - L'Amico Immaginario
programme.desc: Quando Albert va a vivere con Harriet Franklin, l'amica d'infanzia ferocemente indipendente di sua madre, non arriva da solo.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Space dogs
programme.desc: Un giorno due cagnette vengono rapite da una misteriosa automobile e portate in un centro spaziale, dove, sotto la guida del cane istruttore Kazbek e aiutate dal topolino Venya, verranno addestrate per la conquista dello spazio...o quasi..

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Mentre Josh è al college, sua sorella Andrea e Buddy entrano a far parte della squadra di baseball. Ancore una volta, a Buddy viene naturale qualsiasi cosa che includa una palla!

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: Bogus - L'Amico Immaginario

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Sansone
programme.desc: Sansone è un alano abbastanza furbo da tenere sotto scacco il suo padrone e combinare montagne di guai, sempre perdonati dalla sua famiglia umana.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Andalucia
programme.desc: Join Angelica Malini on an unforgettable journey through Andalucía, southern Spain’s most colorful and captivating region, as they explore Cordoba and Cadiz. Famous for flamenco, tapas, and stunning Moorish architecture, Andalucía’s rich history comes alive here. In Cordoba, the host marvels at the breathtaking Mezquita, a grand mosque turned cathedral. In Cadiz, an ancient Phoenician city, they soak in sweeping Atlantic views and a corniche with hints of North Africa. This episode immerses viewers in the culture, history, and vibrant spirit of one of Spain’s most enchanting regions.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Psyche, a mortal of extraordinary beauty, sparks the jealousy of Venus, who sends her son Cupid to curse her with a monstrous love. Instead, Psyche captures Cupid's heart, but her betrayal of his trust breaks their fragile bond. Determined to reunite with him, Psyche endures a series of divine trials. In the end, the gods grant her immortality, and their love prevails—an enduring myth of trust, redemption, and the power of true devotion.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.desc: In January 2022, Daniele Gatti conducted the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai at the Turin Auditorium, performing Wagner’s "Parsifal" excerpts and Bruckner’s Symphony No. 9. The programme highlighted Wagner's meditative Prelude to Act III and Good Friday Spell, followed by Bruckner’s profound Ninth Symphony, marked by its emotional depth and unfinished final movement.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Slovenia Alpine to Adriatic
programme.desc: Slovenia’s event calendar blends folklore, heritage, and contemporary culture, from the playful traditions of Carnival in Cerknica to the Saltworks Festival, celebrating coastal history and local identity. Modern creativity comes to the fore at LUV Fest, reflecting the country’s evolving cultural expression within the Mediterranean and Adriatic region.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Whats On Portugal Colours of the Coast
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastline becomes a stage for tradition, art, and contemporary expression, from the vibrant rituals of Festa das Cruzes, to the colourful installations of The Umbrella Sky Project transforming public spaces, and the Walk & Talk Biennale, where art, architecture, and community intersect across the landscape.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Florence
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Florence, the heart of Tuscany and birthplace of the Renaissance. She visits iconic landmarks like the Duomo, Uffizi Gallery, and Ponte Vecchio, uncovering the city’s artistic legacy. Along the way, she enjoys Tuscan classics like Bistecca alla Fiorentina and the delicious schiaccata panino.

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: A perfect balance of savory and sweet with orzo, chicken, and colorful peppers, a vibrant Mediterranean-inspired dish. For dessert, rich, chocolatey brownies provide a decadent finish. An episode celebrating simple, flavorful cooking paired with indulgent treats.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Nations 03 Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey, where cultures, continents, and centuries of history all come together. Turkey has a lot of different traditions, flavours, and history that have been shaped by powerful empires and cultural crossroads that have been around for hundreds of years. You can see this from the busy streets of Istanbul to the sunny Mediterranean coast.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Makarska
programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.desc: Malta’s event calendar blends food, music, innovation, and heritage, from the flavours of the Malta International Food Festival to the electronic energy of Glitch Festival. Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The flavors of land and sea are brought together in the kitchen, with prawn linguine, a light and savory pasta dish brimming with fresh Mediterranean seafood. For dessert, galaktompoureko, a traditional Greek custard-filled pastry with golden, crispy layers, provides a sweet and indulgent finale. An episode celebrating the best of classic Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Panel Tokenizing Real Estate
programme.desc: Tokenization is transforming real estate by turning property into digital assets that can be bought, sold, and shared with unprecedented flexibility. This panel explores how blockchain enables fractional ownership, improves liquidity, and opens property investment to a wider, global audience—while addressing the legal, regulatory, and trust challenges shaping the future of tokenized real estate in the Mediterranean and beyond.

From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.desc: Malini Angelica embarks on a journey through the island of Crete, Greece, uncovering its stunning landscapes, rich culture, and hidden gems that reveal the island’s most authentic side.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Full of hearty, traditional flavors, this dish features barley bread, a rustic and wholesome staple, paired with black-eyed beans cooked to perfection for a satisfying and nutritious meal. An episode celebrating the simplicity and richness of timeless Mediterranean recipes.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta travels to San Vito Lo Capo in Sicily, retracing the footsteps of Saracen pirates who once haunted the Mediterranean. Amid coastal landscapes and historical echoes, the journey explores local traditions shaped by centuries of cultural exchange. Couscous, legends, and sea stories bring the spirit of Sicily’s past vividly to life.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Just south of Naples, we'll experience the breathtaking Amalfi Coast, including trendy Positano, the limoncello charms of Sorrento, the ancient Greek temples at Paestum, and the Blue Grotto hidden beneath the enchanting Isle of Capri.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.desc: At the heart of the Mediterranean, Italy’s event calendar comes alive through the Mediterranea Metal Cruise at sea, the innovation-driven SIGMA Rome, the Med Film Festival and MedFilm Festival celebrating Mediterranean cinema, and the Cous Cous Fest, where food becomes a symbol of cultural exchange.

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.desc: Malta’s event calendar blends food, music, innovation, and heritage, from the flavours of the Malta International Food Festival to the electronic energy of Glitch Festival. Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Imotska krajina
programme.desc: Imotski, known for its stunning Red and Blue Lakes, draws nature lovers and active travelers alike. During a local marenda break, host Jurica Grbavac introduced us to regional flavors—pivca and pura, a true taste of Imotski tradition.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Join Rick as we explore Andalucía - prancing horses, whitewashed hilltowns, kite surfing on sunny beaches. Then we'll summit the Rock of Gibraltar and sample Morocco, from tribal musicians and busy artisans to the magic of its markets

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Delve into wholesome flavors with a traditional chortopita, a savory pie filled with fresh greens and herbs, paired with a hearty chickpeas and spinach dish brightened with lemon and tomato for a satisfying, nutritious meal.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Carnival Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Step into a world of color, music, and masks as the Mediterranean celebrates its iconic carnivals. Malta’s Karnival Malta lights up the streets with parades and flamboyant costumes. In Slovenia, the Carnival in Cerknica keeps centuries-old traditions alive, and Italy’s legendary Venice Carnival mesmerizes with elegance and historic pageantry. This is celebration at its most spectacular.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Full of hearty, traditional flavors, this dish features barley bread, a rustic and wholesome staple, paired with black-eyed beans cooked to perfection for a satisfying and nutritious meal. An episode celebrating the simplicity and richness of timeless Mediterranean recipes.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property Transfer: Protection vs Efficiency
programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. This panel investigates how legal structures can protect buyers and investors without slowing progress, and what reforms are needed to ensure efficient, transparent, and future-ready property transfer across the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Origini
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

programme.title: MED Destination VENICE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The beats of the Mediterranean tell a story of culture, energy, and innovation. Malta’s Mużika Mużika celebrates local talent, Italy’s Nameless Festival electrifies the coast with indie and electronic sounds, Spain rocks out at Azkena Rock Festival, and Turkey swings with jazz at the Istanbul Caz Festival. Feel the pulse that moves the region.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Menorca
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Menorca, from Mahon’s markets and history to Ciutadella’s gothic charm and northern beaches. In Es Migjorn Gran, she hikes to ancient caves, visits Binigaus beach, and also learns to make Mahon style cheese.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA

programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Traditional and modern flavors combined with sheftalia, the classic Cypriot sausage made with chicken mince, paired with a refreshing lemon cheesecake mousse for dessert. A delicious blend of savory heritage and sweet indulgence that celebrates Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

In Slovenia, the Carnival in Cerknica keeps centuries-old traditions alive, and Italy’s legendary Venice Carnival mesmerizes with elegance and historic pageantry. programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.
